case_title: BLADYS A BERMUDEZ AMAYA VS. JENNY CHEUNG

docket_entries.description: WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF BERMUDEZ AMAYA, BLADYS A AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, JENNY
